sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81306" key="perie/leusis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιέλευσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n81306.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">coming</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">going round</tr_>, dub. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.916d</biblScope> </bibl>(pl.), cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">περιέλασις</foreign> : <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">gloss on </lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">περίοδος</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
